name: python3-emailahoy3
title: python3-emailahoy3
summary: Utility to verify existence of an email address (Python 3)
description:
Utility to verify existence of an email address (Python 3)
This package contains a Python email utility that verifies existence of an
email address.
.
This package is based on the un33k/python-emailahoy  Python module which only
run in Python 2. It has been refactored to work in Python 3.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-emailahoy3 because Utility to verify existence of an email address (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-emailahoy3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-emailahoy3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-emailahoy3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
